events.name: SC Freiburg at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen beat  Augsburg 2-1 on the last matchday Saturday to become the first team in Bundesliga history to complete a season without a loss.

video.headline: Leverkusen make history with unbeaten season in the Bundesliga

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Leverkusen make history with unbeaten season in the Bundesliga) 2024/05/18 US ONLY

headlines.description: Bayern Munich slumped to a 4-2 defeat at Hoffenheim in the Bundesliga finale on Saturday, ending a disappointing season in third place.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern finish third in Bundesliga after 4-2 loss

video.headline: Hoffenheim stun Bayern after Kramarić's hat trick on final day

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Hoffenheim stun Bayern after Kramarić’s hat trick on final day) 2024/05/18 US ONLY
